title: Birkat as Sab‘ Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Birkat as Sab‘ with a Z-Score of +3.46. The event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Birkat as Sab‘ is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 11.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 29%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is at 7.4 km/h. 
 The city is experiencing a critical heat wave event, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
